summary:
There is currently insufficient evidence from available literature linking LY6K overexpression to improved outcomes in non-small cell lung cancer patients. The provided studies do not report any direct associations involving LY6K; instead they focus on other established markers such as immune infiltrates or genetic alterations related to tumor progression.

Final Answer: No
